## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New dish or AOP data
- [ ] New translation / locale
- [ ] Feature or improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] `./bin/ci` is green locally
- [ ] If dish data changed, ran `npm run build:data` and committed `public/data/dishes.json`
- [ ] If the UI changed, included a screenshot or short recording above
- [ ] If user-facing strings changed, added them in both `fr` and `en` in `src/i18n/ui.ts`
